title: Netheritium
description:
New weapons and armor even better than netherite
Textures made by Zeyro
body:
# Netheritium 
Netheritium is a mod that adds new tools and armor of the netheritium material,
that are even stronger than the ones of netherite material.


![Netheritium Pickaxe - crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf5d0c292b6ecd5247226b52f9cff3281a3e7ffe.png)

the above is an example of how you can craft tools and armor of this new material.

it's the same as for diamond tools and armor, 
just with netheritium ingots instead.

you can also make a netheritium block just as you can craft a diamond block

![Netheritium Ingot - smithing recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e251bff27f8450a56c75fee2f6869e4a5e1f8ad.png)

you can obtain netheritium ingots with the above recipe through a smithing table

the required netheritium scrap for this recipe can be found in shipwreck treasure chests, buried treasures, and in end cities

Textures made by Zeyro
